Hello, is this accurate on 6.2? Are you using a GENERIC kernel? Are you 
seeing this with different hardware as well? 
I am using an vr interface myself in a 'loaded' colo machine and I do not 
see the problem you are mentioning here in 6.1 and 6-stable.
